
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}}
markdown
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Tiger also known as  Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|qid=Q134032|lt=Chinese calendar|1=Chinese calendar}}.

It is the third in the sequence of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}, following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=branch|1=Earthly Branches}} 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: Heiin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần

==Years of Yang Fire Tiger==
A year is classified as Heiin if its {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Western calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Heiin Years'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
*{{ill|6|en|6|qid=Q23488|lt=6|1=6}}
*{{ill|66|en|66|qid=Q4642187|lt=66|1=66}}
*{{ill|126|en|126|qid=Q395837|lt=126|1=126}}
*{{ill|186|en|186|qid=Q33222|lt=186|1=186}}
*{{ill|246|en|246|qid=Q33855|lt=246|1=246}}
*{{ill|306|en|306|qid=Q33542|lt=306|1=306}}
*{{ill|366|en|366|qid=Q32844|lt=366|1=366}}
*{{ill|426|en|426|qid=Q31168|lt=426|1=426}}
*{{ill|486|en|486|qid=Q32541|lt=486|1=486}}
*{{ill|546|en|546|qid=Q31010|lt=546|1=546}}
*{{ill|606|en|606|qid=Q31043|lt=606|1=606}}
*{{ill|666|en|666|qid=Q232189|lt=666|1=666}}
*{{ill|726|en|726|qid=Q23555|lt=726|1=726}}
*{{ill|786|en|786|qid=Q30307|lt=786|1=786}}
*{{ill|846|en|846|qid=Q30454|lt=846|1=846}}
*{{ill|906|en|906|qid=Q24875|lt=906|1=906}}
*{{ill|966|en|966|qid=Q23743|lt=966|1=966}}
|
*{{ill|1026|en|1026|qid=Q19269|lt=1026|1=1026}}
*{{ill|1086|en|1086|qid=Q19460|lt=1086|1=1086}}
*{{ill|1146|en|1146|qid=Q19627|lt=1146|1=1146}}
*{{ill|1206|en|1206|qid=Q5230|lt=1206|1=1206}}
*{{ill|1266|en|1266|qid=Q5517|lt=1266|1=1266}}
*{{ill|1326|en|1326|qid=Q5782|lt=1326|1=1326}}
*{{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}}
*{{ill|1446|en|1446|qid=Q6430|lt=1446|1=1446}}
*{{ill|1506|en|1506|qid=Q6154|lt=1506|1=1506}}
*{{ill|1566|en|1566|qid=Q6638|lt=1566|1=1566}}
*{{ill|1626|en|1626|qid=Q6831|lt=1626|1=1626}}
*{{ill|1686|en|1686|qid=Q7664|lt=1686|1=1686}}
*{{ill|1746|en|1746|qid=Q7589|lt=1746|1=1746}}
*{{ill|1806|en|1806|qid=Q6903|lt=1806|1=1806}}
*{{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}}
*{{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}}
*{{ill|1986|en|1986|qid=Q2430|lt=1986|1=1986}}
|
*{{ill|2046|en|2046|qid=Q49921|lt=2046|1=2046}}
*[[:en:2106|2106]]
*[[:en:2166|2166]]
*{{ill|2226|en|2226|qid=Q12379772|lt=2226|1=2226}}
*{{ill|2286|en|2286|qid=Q97232321|lt=2286|1=2286}}
*[[:en:2346|2346]]
*[[:en:2406|2406]]
*[[:en:2466|2466]]
*[[2526]]
*[[2586]]
*[[2646]]
*{{ill|2706|en|2706|qid=Q4632514|lt=2706|1=2706}}
*[[2766]]
*[[2826]]
*[[2886]]
*[[:en:2946|2946]]
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Tiger==
The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}.

==Days of Yang Fire Tiger==
=== Rekichū (Lower Section) ===
Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows:
* [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also ==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|丙寅|qq=Yang Fire Tiger|version=98658211|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q767248|af|Vuurtier (astrologie)|cdo|Bīng-ìng|de|Feuer-Tiger|fr|Tigre de feu|hak|Piáng-yìm|ja|丙寅|ko|병인|nds|Füür-Tiger|vi|Bính Dần|za|Bingjyinz|zh-min-nan|Péng-în|zh-yue|丙寅|zh|丙寅|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Tigeri|de|Yang Fire Tiger|de|Feuer-Tigreen|en|Fire Tiger|fr|Tigre de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|za|Bingceij|ar|Yang Fire Tiger}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
